headline: Is Paychex (PAYX) Offering Value After A 34.9% One Year Share Price Decline?
summary: If you are wondering whether Paychex at around US$90.61 is offering value or just a value trap, this article walks through the key signals you can use to judge the stock for yourself. The share price is around US$90.61 after a 2.0% decline over the past week, a 0.7% decline over the past month, and a 16.6% decline year to date, with a 34.9% decline over the past year putting recent returns in sharp focus. These weaker returns have put more attention on what investors are currently paying for...
